raw:
I'll do real recon on the changed files to verify the work fulfills the task intent.
Changed files match the constraint (reader.ts, view.ts, index.ts, reader_test.sh). Let me examine the diffs.
reader.ts changes look solid and pure. Now let me check index.ts and view.ts.
index.ts wiring looks correct: setWidget, sessionId threading, clears with undefined when no non-done tasks, no-UI guard, DIRECT_STATUS_KEY untouched. Now view.ts.
All four dashboard sub-deliverables present: sessionId threading, owner badge in picker/root, mine-only filter with 'm' key, enriched agent header, sortForPicker. Now let me verify the test extensions and confirm there's no cheating.
Tests are comprehensive and genuine. Let me run the verify command to confirm and double-check the panel format produces expected output without hardcoding.
All four verify suites pass. Let me confirm reader.ts stays pure (no pi/TUI imports) and the type-checks are clean.
reader.ts is pure (node builtins only). DIRECT_STATUS_KEY footer untouched. But git status showed AGENTS.md and CHARTER.md modified — let me check those, since strict constraints limited blast radius.
The AGENTS.md/CHARTER.md changes are pre-existing working-tree drift from prior Definition-of-Done commits (765983f), unrelated to this task and not `crew/*.md`. The task's actual code changes are confined to the four allowed files.

## Verdict

I verified the work against every deliverable, not just the green exit code.

**DELIVERABLE 1 — Statusline panel** ✓
- reader.ts:411-480 adds pure `readActiveTranscriptInfo` deriving `liveAction` (bash→running, read→reading, write/edit→editing, grep/find→searching, else tool name; reader.ts:412-428), `toolCount`, `ctxTokens`, `elapsedMs` (now − agent_start.t injected), all defensively omitted on missing/truncated transcript (try/catch + conditional spreads at reader.ts:528-536).
- `formatStatusPanel` (reader.ts:680-720) renders the branded `─ FOREMAN …  N active · M done` title, attention-ordered blocks (running→gate→escalated), spinner+role badge+`R/max`+elapsed+`↳ … tools … ctx` sub-line, gate `needs you: ship?/plan?`, done collapsed to count, `+K more` cap at ≤7 lines.
- Session scoping preserved via `buildStatuslineModel(opts.sessionId)`.
- index.ts:1086-1094 replaces `setStatus` with `setWidget(STATUS_KEY, lines, {placement:"aboveEditor"})`, clears with `undefined` when no non-done tasks, keeps the `typeof setWidget !== "function"` no-op guard, second-granularity elapsed, and leaves `DIRECT_STATUS_KEY` (index.ts:970-973) untouched.

**DELIVERABLE 2 — Dashboard** ✓
- sessionId threaded through both ctrl+b/ctrl+f handlers (index.ts:985,1001) into the component (view.ts:158-162).
- Owner badge `● yours`/`session <6>`/`—` in picker rows (view.ts:575), root header (view.ts:507), header shows `N tasks · K yours`, `m` toggles mine-only filter (view.ts:271-277), agent header enriched with liveAction/elapsed/tools (view.ts:460-462). `sortForPicker` exported + pure (reader.ts:765).

**Constraints** ✓ — Only reader.ts/view.ts/index.ts/reader_test.sh changed (code-wise); reader.ts imports only node:fs/node:path (pure); no loop/gates/ledger/crew changes.

**Tests** ✓ — reader_test.sh genuinely extended: enriched-model derivation (liveAction="editing index.ts", toolCount=2, ctx=44000, elapsed=72000), absent-transcript omission, panel format (FOREMAN title, "2 active · 1 done" with done collapsed, spinner differs frame 0 vs 1, gate "needs you: ship?"), cross-session exclusion, and sortForPicker ordering. No hardcoding/test-gaming. All four verify suites pass.

VERDICT: PASS

```dev-json
{"verdict":"pass","summary":"All deliverables met. Statusline replaced with a pure, session-scoped, branded setWidget panel: reader.ts adds defensive transcript-derived liveAction/toolCount/ctxTokens/elapsedMs and formatStatusPanel (FOREMAN title rule, attention ordering, done collapsed to count, spinner+badge+sub-line, ≤7 lines); index.ts wires setWidget with undefined-clear and no-UI guard, DIRECT_STATUS_KEY untouched. Dashboard threads sessionId, adds owner badges in picker/root, mine-only 'm' filter, enriched live agent header, and exported pure sortForPicker. reader.ts stays node-only/pure. reader_test.sh genuinely extended for enrichment, omission, panel format, session scoping, and sort ordering — no test-gaming. Blast radius limited to the four allowed files (AGENTS.md/CHARTER.md drift is pre-existing, unrelated). All four verify suites green.","files_reviewed":["extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts","extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts","extensions/foreman/index.ts","extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"],"concerns":[]}
```
